title: Blockley
description: A Texture Pack that turns every pixel into a Block
body:
# Blockley 🚀

**Blockley** is a Minecraft resource pack that transforms the game by turning **every single pixel into a block**.

Every pixel on a texture becomes the texture of an in-game block. Instead of pixels being flat image data, each one is represented as its own block, creating a true one-to-one relationship between pixels and blocks.

Because of this, **Blockley effectively functions as a high-resolution 256×256 resource pack**, with detail emerging from geometry rather than traditional texture resolution.

The result is a highly detailed, hyper-voxelized world where familiar textures are reconstructed at a new scale. Small visual details turn into large structures, and surfaces gain depth and physical presence while remaining consistent with the original textures.

## Features
- Every pixel is turned into the texture of an in-game block
- One-to-one pixel-to-block mapping
- Effective 256×256 visual resolution
- Works with all default Minecraft textures
- Unique, extreme voxel-based visual style

**Blockley** pushes Minecraft’s block concept to its absolute limit — down to the pixel.
